StageAttention[1]: A father. A governor. A professor of neuroscience. An ordinary man consumed by death, regret, and lingering bitterness.
StageAttention[2]: Tavis winds up before launching an uppercut, then leaps after his target and slams down from above.
StageAttention[3]: Tavis charges up through his shield before charging toward his target with a shield rush.
StageAttention[4]: Tavis briefly charges up, then performs a throw on the target.
StageAttention[5]: Tavis hurls the shield from his arm. Parry it to deflect the shield.
StageAttention[6]: Tavis charges his shield before unleashing a swift and powerful four-hit combo.
StageAttention[7]: Tavis lunges forward with a powerful thrust, then whips up a whirlwind and leaps into the air, crashing down onto the ground.
StageAttention[8]: Tavis leaps into the air and activates the enhanced power of his wing unit, unleashing two powerful slashes. He then merges his blades before soaring into the air and crashing down on his target.
StageAttention[9]: Tavis hurls his shield at the target. The shield can be deflected with a successful Parry. If the shield is deflected, Tavis bats it away, briefly charges, then lunges forward with a powerful thrust. If the shield is not deflected, Tavis rushes in and follows up with a three-hit combo.
StageAttention[10]: Tavis unleashes a powerful two-hit combo, followed by either a downward slash that can be parried or a spinning slash that cannot.
StageAttention[11]: Tavis charges his wing unit, accelerates into a high-speed glide, then dives toward his target with a crushing slam.

StageAttention[1]: Saturation Gauge is a resource shared by both the player and the Boss, with each side tracking its own gauge independently. Players can consume the gauge to perform a Threshold Dodge, empowering their next attack. The Boss consumes its gauge to unleash Overdrive attacks. During Overdrive, the Boss is immune to all damage, and the final hit of its attack is enhanced. Overdrive attacks cannot be avoided with a normal dodge. When the Saturation Gauge is depleted, the player or Boss enters Attrition. Entering this state interrupts the current action, and the Saturation Gauge cannot be used again until it has fully recovered.
StageAttention[2]: Enhanced dodge. While in the Threshold State, the player becomes immune to all damage, including Overdrive Moves. Performing a Threshold Surge empowers the player's next attack.
StageAttention[3]: A powered-up state entered after performing a Threshold Surge. Your next attack (Basic Attack or Orb Ping) is enhanced, and you gain one free 3-Ping.
StageAttention[4]: Enhanced move. During Overdrive, the Boss is immune to all damage. If the player dodges the final hit of an Overdrive Move, a set amount of Threshold Surge Gauge is consumed.
StageAttention[5]: A special gauge displayed to the left of the Boss's HP bar. While Matrix Lock is active, Extreme Dodges cannot trigger Matrix. Matrix Lock is reduced whenever the player lands a Threshold Surge-enhanced Basic Attack or drives the Boss into Attrition. Once the Matrix Lock is depleted, Matrix is triggered.
